title: CSSMotion Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.json inside a .cssm animation bundle. A .cssm file is a ZIP archive containing an SVG, CSS keyframes, and this manifest — enabling zero-runtime, browser-native CSS animations.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema meta-schema. Optional but recommended for IDE IntelliSense.

specVersion.description: Semver version of the .cssm specification this manifest targets. Players MUST ignore unknown fields from higher minor versions.

id.description: URL-safe slug uniquely identifying this animation within a creator's namespace. Used in marketplace URLs, CDN paths, and npm packages.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the animation.

description.description: Short description of the animation, its purpose, and suggested use cases.

tags.description: Freeform lowercase slug tags for search and discovery.

category.description: Primary category for marketplace filtering. Choose the most specific match.

generator.description: Name and version of the tool that generated this file.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this animation was first created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent update.

revision.description: Monotonically increasing integer. Increment on every published update.

author.description: Full name or handle of the primary creator.

organization.description: Company or team name, if applicable.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or 'Commercial'. See https://spdx.org/licenses/

playback.description: Default playback behavior for the animation. All values correspond to CSS animation properties and should match what is declared in animation.css.

duration.description: Duration of one full animation cycle in milliseconds. Must match animation-duration in animation.css.

iterationCount.description: Number of times the animation repeats. Mirrors CSS animation-iteration-count.

fillMode.description: Mirrors CSS animation-fill-mode. 'forwards' is recommended for most one-shot animations.

easing.description: Default easing function. Mirrors CSS animation-timing-function. Accepts any valid CSS easing value including linear(), cubic-bezier(), etc.

autoplay.description: Whether the animation should start playing automatically when loaded or triggered.

triggers.description: Declarative trigger configuration. The cssm-player web component uses these to set up event listeners and CSS class toggles automatically.

hover.description: Play animation when the host element is hovered.

click.description: Play animation when the host element is clicked.

inView.description: Play animation when the element enters the viewport (uses IntersectionObserver).

scroll.description: Link animation progress to scroll position (animation.css must use animation-timeline: scroll() or view()).

intermission.description: Milliseconds to pause between loop iterations.

dimensions.description: Intrinsic dimensions and scaling behavior of the animation canvas.

width.description: Intrinsic width of the animation in CSS pixels.

height.description: Intrinsic height of the animation in CSS pixels.

aspectRatio.description: CSS aspect-ratio value. Derived from width/height but declared explicitly for the player.

scalingBehavior.description: How the animation SVG scales within its container. Mirrors CSS object-fit behavior.

theming.description: The theming API for this animation. Exposes CSS custom properties (--cssm-* tokens) that consumers can override to customize colors, sizes, and timing without editing the source.

colorScheme.description: Color schemes this animation is designed to support.

tokens.description: Ordered list of CSS custom properties that are part of the animation's public theming API. All tokens MUST be declared with @property in animation.css and MUST be prefixed with '--cssm-'.

name.description: The CSS custom property name. Must start with '--cssm-' to prevent collision with host page variables.

type.description: The @property syntax type. Directly maps to CSS @property { syntax: '<type>' }.

defaultValue.description: The initial-value declared in @property in animation.css. Used by the marketplace theming panel to pre-populate inputs.

description.description: Human-readable description for the marketplace theming panel.

group.description: Groups tokens in the theming panel UI.

required.description: If true, the animation may not render correctly without this token being overridden by the consumer.

variants.description: Alternate CSS files (inside the .cssm ZIP) that override token values for specific contexts. Applied as an additional <style> layer on top of animation.css.

id.description: Unique identifier for this variant. Used as the value of the 'variant' attribute on cssm-player.

name.description: Human-readable label for the marketplace theming panel.

file.description: Relative path to the variant CSS file within the .cssm ZIP.

mediaQuery.description: If set, the player will apply this variant automatically when the given CSS media query matches (e.g. dark mode). If null, must be applied explicitly.

accessibility.description: Motion accessibility declarations. The cssm-player web component enforces these automatically.

reducedMotionBehavior.description: How the player behaves when prefers-reduced-motion: reduce is detected. 'static': show first frame of SVG only, no animation. 'reduced': load reducedMotionFile CSS instead. 'none': animate regardless (only for essential animations — requires autoplayNote justification).

reducedMotionFile.description: Path to an alternate CSS file inside the ZIP to use when reducedMotionBehavior is 'reduced'. This CSS should produce a simpler, slower, or non-moving version of the animation.

flashRisk.description: Risk level of rapid flashing or strobing. 'high' means the animation may fail WCAG SC 2.3.1 (Three Flashes). The marketplace will display a warning for 'low' and block 'high' from Featured status.

seizureRisk.description: Set to true if the animation contains rapid color changes or flashing that could trigger photosensitive seizures. Will be blocked from autoplay in the marketplace player.

autoplayNote.description: Required when reducedMotionBehavior is 'none'. Must explain why this animation is essential and cannot be reduced.

wcagLevel.description: Self-reported WCAG conformance level. 'AA' or higher is required for Featured status on the marketplace.

technical.description: Browser compatibility and CSS feature declarations. Used by the player to check CSS.supports() before loading, enabling graceful degradation.

cssFeatures.description: CSS features used in animation.css. The player uses this array to check CSS.supports() and gracefully degrade or warn.

scrollDriven.description: Shorthand flag: true if animation-timeline: scroll() or view() is used. Triggers a polyfill or warning for unsupported browsers.

viewTransition.description: Shorthand flag: true if the View Transitions API is used.

requiresJS.description: MUST be false for a valid .cssm animation. The animation.css must work with zero JavaScript. The player itself uses JS but the animation must not depend on it.

minBrowserSupport.description: Minimum browser versions required for the animation to function correctly.

assets.description: File paths within the .cssm ZIP for the animation's core assets.

svg.description: Relative path to the SVG file containing the animation's shapes. Must not contain any animation code — structure only.

css.description: Relative path to the CSS file containing all @keyframes, @property declarations, and animation rules.

thumbnail.description: Relative path to a static PNG thumbnail (recommended: 400×400px).

animated.description: Relative path to an optional animated GIF preview for marketplace listing cards (recommended: ≤2s loop, ≤200KB).

custom.description: Arbitrary extension data. For platform-specific fields, tooling metadata, or future spec extensions. Players MUST ignore unrecognized keys in this object.
